entry.title: 🔴 Developing modern terminal-based tools for SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: In this session, we will explore practical reasons for using terminal-based applications when working with SAP Cloud Integration. We will examine scenarios where these tools can enhance the SAP Cloud Integration developer experience by enriching their toolbox, which traditionally relies on popular browsers, code editors, and IDEs. Additionally, we will delve into a sample application that illustrates the typical essential layers and building blocks. While this application leverages a Go-based technology stack, the underlying concepts and key ideas are universally applicable and can be used across a wide range of technologies.

entry.title: 🔴 Navigating EDA Complexity: SAP Integration Suite, AEM and Event Portal solutions
entry.content:
As enterprises are becoming increasingly agile and responsive, adopting Event-driven Architecture is critical. However fully leveraging EDA for its benefits comes with its set of challenges. Most enterprises often struggle with understanding the intricate landscape of events, managing event descriptions, identifying and visualizing event flows across multiple applications etc.

Although there are plenty of discussions and blogs about the SAP Integration Suite’s Advanced Event Mesh, its features and benefits, its event portal capabilities remain somewhat under-explored and under appreciated. This talk will dive into the need of an event portal, the capabilities of the AEM Event Portal and how it helps enterprises get a better grip on their EDA landscape.

A key highlight of this presentation is an innovative open-source utility tool developed by Solace. This tool integrates seamlessly with the AEM Event Portal and generates SAP Integration Suite Iflow artifact based on application defintiion within the Event Portal. This Iflow artifact can be direcly imported into the SAP Integration Suite and used by SAP developers to build event driven integration flows inline with SAP standards.

By the end of this session, you will have :
- A clean demonstration of the AEM Event Portal’s capabilities
- An introduction to the Solace open-source utility tool and its role in generating Iflow artifacts
- Real world use cases showcasing the practical implementation and benefits of these technologies.

entry.title: 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
entry.content: Facilitate source-side filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment using custom context attributes for more sophisticated event dispatching. Use dynamic topics for routing and filtering of RAP business events in SAP Advanced Event Mesh.

entry.title: 🔴 Improve Operational Efficiency using AI-enabled API Anomaly Detection
entry.content: API Anomaly Detection refers to the process of identifying unusual or unexpected behavior within API traffic. It involves continuous monitoring of API requests and responses, analyzing patterns, and detecting deviations from established norms. By doing so, organizations can swiftly identify potential security threats, performance bottlenecks, or operational irregularities. In this session, we look at the what, the why and the how aspects of API Anomaly Detection in SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: 🔴 Enterprise Automation with SAP: Latest Enhancements
entry.content: Join us to learn how you can combine integration, process analysis and automation to drive business transformation. Learn how to use event-driven architecture, act on top of the process mining and modeling, and integrate processes in heterogeneous landscapes, all while leveraging AI at scale. Discover the latest features in SAP Integration Suite, SAP Signavio, and SAP Build, and see how they can improve your enterprise automation efforts.

entry.title: 🔴 Discover SAP Event Sources for Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content: SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh is SAP’s market leading event mesh and distributes events in real time in your SAP technical ecosystem and way beyond. Now, what is an event mesh, as sophisticated as it may be, without events? Not much, right? Therefore, we will look into how to expose events from SAP business applications like SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC and SAP SuccessFactors solutions via Advanced Event Mesh. The session will both provide the theoretical and commercial background as well as provide detailed demos of event-enabling the different backends using different approaches.

entry.title: 🔴 Use SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications to consume business events in a CAP application
entry.content: Learn about event driven architecture strategy at SAP and how to follow a clean core strategy through consuming business events from SAP cloud applications in CAP applications.  Learn how BTP exposes SAP business events through SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications for easy consumption in integration and extension scenarios.  We'll guide you through developing broker-agnostic event handlers in CAP, testing them with a local messaging service, and deploying the CAP app with SAP Event Broker to receive events from other systems.

entry.title: Bienvenidos al grupo de la comunidad en Madrid 🇪🇸
entry.content:
¡Hola miembros de SAP Community!

Estoy muy emocionado de poder crear este espacio donde los apasionados del mundo SAP podamos conectarnos, compartir experiencias y aprender juntos. Mi nombre es Antonio Maradiaga y soy parte de esta gran empresa que es SAP pero aparte de ello me gusta mucho compartir con miembros de la comunidad SAP.

You don't speak Spanish? Not a problem... There are also English speakers in the group 🙂 Please join us!

La idea de este grupo, es poder tener un espacio donde los que estamos en Madrid 🇪🇸,  apasionados de
todo este mundo de tecnologia SAP podamos conectarnos, compartir experiencias y aprender juntos.

Independientemenete de tu background en el mundo SAP, ya seas un desarrollador, consultor, estudiante, usuario o simplemente alguien concuriosidad por SAP, este grupo está abierto para todos. Pronto estaré organizando quedadas (SAP Stammtisch), sesiones tecnicas (SAP CodeJams) y tambien compartire otro tipo de eventos  que pasen en todo este mundo de SAP en Madrid.

Asi que, unanse al grupo para recibir notificaciones de los eventos que pasen en Madrid. (Make sure to join the group so you can be notified of future events!)

¡Nos vemos pronto!

Antonio Maradiaga

entry.title: AUSAPE - SAP BTP Build - Build Core - Extensibilidad CAP/RPA + Partner
entry.content:
Evento de AUSAPE, en las nuevas oficinas de SAP España en Madrid, acerca de SAP BTP Build - Build Core - Extensibilidad CAP/RPA + Partner.

REGISTRO EN LA PAGINA DE AUSAPE 👉 Link de registro.

Dirección: 
C/ Ruiz Picasso 11, 3ª planta (edificio pegado a la torre Picasso)
Plaza Pablo Ruiz Picasso
28020 Madrid

Salas: Draco y Casiopea

Agenda: 

  • 09:30 - Introducción - Estrategia Clean Core
  • 09:45 – S4H OnStack extensibility
  • 10:15 – BTP side-by-side extensibility
  • 11:00 – Coffee break 
  • 11:30  – Caso Práctico: BTPChef (demo E2E de BTP con un desarrollo interno que hemos hecho en el equipo de BTP) – 1h
  • 12:30 – Partner 1 - ENABLE
  • 13:15 – SEIDOR - Soluciones basadas en SAP BTP Build Process Automation. Flujos de aprobación y automatización de procesos
    • Ponente: Rafael Julián - Responsable Desarrollo SAP en SEIDOR
  • 14:00 – Cocktail
  • 15:00 - HandsOn - SAP Build Code - Generative AI-powered development with Joule copilot (incluye SAP Build Code y SAP Build Apps)
  • 17:00 – Fin de la jornada

entry.title: Quedada SAP en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content:
¡Hola miembros de la comunidad SAP en Madrid!

La Quedada SAP en Madrid se llevará a cabo el 25 de septiembre de 2024 a las 18:30 hora local en el Honest Greens de Castellana, que esta muy cerca de la nueva oficina de SAP.

La idea es juntarnos y compartir un poco sobre todo lo que es el mundo SAP. Compartir sobre los proyectos SAP en los que trabajamos y hablar de las ultimas novedades. Así que únete y celebremos la quedada inaugural de este grupo.

Por favor, haznos saber si participarás en la quedada haciendo clic en la seccion de RSVP. No tenemos una reserva como tal en el espacio pero es un lugar bastante amplio y podriamos juntar alli un par de mesas. Nota: Cada uno es responsable de comprar su propia comida o bebida si lo desea.

¡Nos vemos pronto!

-----

¡Hola SAP Community members in Madrid!

The SAP Meetup in Madrid will take place on September 25, 2024, at 18:30 local time at Honest Greens in Castellana, which is very close to the new SAP office.

The idea is to get together and share a bit about everything in the SAP world, including the SAP projects we are working on and the latest news. So join us, and let's celebrate this group's inaugural meetup.

Please let us know if you will be participating in the meetup by clicking on the RSVP section. We do not have a reservation in the space, but it is fairly large, and we could put a couple of tables together there. Note: Everyone is responsible for purchasing their own food or drinks if they wish to.

See you soon!

Antonio Maradiaga
Developer Advocate @ SAP

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 - Integration track sessions
entry.content:
We are days away from the first session of this year's Devtoberfest, our annual virtual celebration dedicated to the SAP developer community. There is a lot going on in the integration space, and as part of Devtoberfest 2024 we will have sessions covering the following topics: APIs and Events, Tools for integration developers, open source and more.

As you might be aware, every track is assigned a unique day across the four weeks that Devtoberfest takes place and Wednesdays will be all about integration.

Devtoberfest 2024 sessions

You can find all the different tracks/sessions that are part of Devtoberfest here. You can filter all events by selecting the topic (label) you are interested in, e.g. integration 😉.

Let me quickly share all the sessions that we will have as part of the integration track:

25th of September:

  • 09:30 CET - 🔴FlashPipe - Your CI/CD Companion for SAP Integration Suite
  • 11:00 CET - 🔴Speed up your SAP Cloud Integration Development with CPI-Helper
  • 13:00 CET - 🔴Automate your SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPILint

2nd of October:

  • 09:30 CET - 🔴Developing modern terminal-based tools for SAP Cloud Integration
  • 11:00 CET - 🔴Navigating EDA Complexity: SAP Integration Suite Advanced Event Mesh and AEM Event Portal Solutions
  • 15:00 CET - 🔴CloudEvents for interoperable event systems

16th of October:

  • 09:30 CET - ‌🔴‌‌ Harnessing S/4HANA Events in SAP Build
  • 11:00 CET - 🔴Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
  • 15:00 CET - 🔴Discover SAP Event Sources for Advanced Event Mesh
  • 16:30 CET - 🔴Use SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications to consume business events in a CAP application

25th of October:

  • 09:30 CET - 🔴Improve Operational Efficiency using AI-enabled API Anomaly Detection
  • 15:00 CET - 🔴Enterprise Automation with SAP: Latest Enhancements

Note: If you click on any of the times of the sessions above, you will download the calendar invite for the session.

So go ahead and RSVP to the different sessions you are interested in. Also, make sure to download the calendar invites so that you don't miss the session and you can get a chance to ask the speaker any questions that you might have about the topic.

Happy learning this Devtoberfest 2024!

entry.title: SAP Customer Success Day for BTP - Madrid - 9th of October
entry.content:
REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

This Customer Success Day will focus on Business Technology Platform.

During this exclusive event, you will be among fellow SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) pioneers, enabling you to connect with peers and SAP experts to gain insights and maximize your SAP BTP knowledge. This is credit to an environment where customers can learn from one another and provide feedback on how to enhance the SAP offering.
 
During this event you will hear from SAP leaders and adoption experts - learn about the experiences of other customers through keynotes and panel discussions, participate in hands-on workshops, hear the latest updates on SAP BTP roadmap – all with a focus on helping you get the most value from SAP BTP solutions. 

This is an exclusive event with limited capacity.
Secure your seat today!

REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content: Mas de un tocayo ira al evento 😉

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Not an office setting and definitely not my pet... but it is possible that "la vaquilla" is someone's pet here in Spain 🙂
